description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:boron-alpine Docker image, with a global before_script that runs `npm install --ignore-scripts` and caches the `node_modules` directory keyed by the project ID. Define the stages lint, test, build, and deploy. In the lint stage add a `lint` job that runs `npm run lint`. In the test stage add a `test:coverage` job that runs `npm run test:coverage`, stores the `coverage` folder as a 30‑minute artifact and extracts coverage using the regex `/Statements\s+:\s(\d+(?:\.\d+)?%)/`, plus three node version jobs (`test:node:4` using `node:argon-alpine` with `allow_failure:true`, `test:node:6` using the default image, and `test:node:7` using `node:alpine`) each running `npm run test`. In the build stage add `build` and `build:api` jobs that run `npm run build` and `npm run build:api` respectively, each publishing `dist` or `api` as a 30‑minute artifact and only triggering on tag names matching the regex `^v\d\.\d\.\d$`. In the deploy stage add a `pages` job that depends on the two build jobs and `test:coverage`, creates `public/coverage` and `public/api` directories, copies the respective outputs into them, and publishes the `public` folder as an artifact, and a `publish` job that also depends on the build jobs, writes the npm auth token from the `NPM_TOKEN` secret to `.npmrc`, and runs `npm publish --access public`, both only on the same tag pattern.
